cvs_standard: All entities source-attributed. No pattern-inferred entities.

entities_detailed.name: Tan Sri Abdul Hadi Awang
entities_detailed.context: Negri polls: PAS in talks with Umno for political cooperation, claims Abdul Hadi ... SEREMBAN: PAS is in talks with Umno to form a political cooperation to face the Aug 1 Negri Sembilan polls, claims Tan Sri Abdul Hadi Awang.
entities_detailed.note: Directly claims PAS-Umno negotiations for NS PRN; key NS election figure

entities_detailed.name: Datuk Seri Jalaluddin Alias
entities_detailed.context: SEREMBAN: Barisan Nasional's decisive victory in Johor will boost the coalition's morale and increase momentum in Negri Sembilan, which goes to the polls on Aug 1, says Datuk Seri Jalaluddin Alias.
entities_detailed.note: Speaking from Seremban about NS PRN; key NS election figure

entities_detailed.name: Datuk Onn Hafiz Ghazi
entities_detailed.context: JOHOR BARU: Datuk Onn Hafiz Ghazi is no stranger to Johor's political landscape as he begins a second term as Mentri Besar, following Barisan Nasional's successful outing in the just-concluded Johor election
entities_detailed.note: Johor MB, not NS; BN momentum narrative relevant to NS PRN context

entities_detailed.name: Ahmad Zahid
entities_detailed.context: Ahmad Zahid congratulates Onn Hafiz on appointment as Johor MB
entities_detailed.note: National-level; Johor MB appointment, not NS-specific

entities_detailed.name: Syed Saddiq
entities_detailed.context: Bapa harap karier politik Syed Saddiq tidak terhenti / Luahan hati Syed Saddiq menjelang keputusan Mahkamah Persekutuan esok
entities_detailed.note: National court case (Kes Dana Armada); Federal Court verdict pending; not NS-specific
